summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed for 10 listed candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned directly by the worker. Open non-security PRs are kept for further proof/review because they are not merge-ready; already-closed PRs are kept closed; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
